title: Server-survival Collapse Run
objective: Survive a 45-second server-survival collapse by dodging hostile streams, grabbing unstable boosts, and deciding when a risky build lane is worth the multiplier spike.

controls.outcome: Shift lanes to dodge collapsing hazards

controls.input: Hold your lane through a glowing opening
controls.outcome: Gain multiplier, bonus time, and faster future waves

steps: Hazards pour down the server-survival grid while your runner hugs the bottom edge.
Safe server-survival boosts appear inside dangerous gaps; taking one raises the combo and speeds up the next few seconds.
One bad collision breaks the streak and chunks the timer, so every greedy lane swap is a bet.
scoring: You score for survival, near-miss rhythm, and every unstable boost captured. Multipliers rise with clean risky pickups, not just passive endurance.
tips: Use the center lane as your reset point before chasing a build boost.
A small combo is safer than a broken timer; treat the multiplier like a wager.
Late waves accelerate hardest after greedy pickups, so read the next opening before committing.

trendContext.title: server-survival Tower defense game that teaches cloud architecture. Build infrastructure, survive traffic, learn scaling.
